seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The keyword "art" must appear at least five times.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "art" in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The keyword "art" must appear at least five times. Avoid using the keyword "art" in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Shows

Dear Gallery Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to inquire about the creative works and visual displays you have scheduled for the coming months. As a devoted admirer of visual expression, I am eager to learn more about the new pieces you will be showcasing.

Could you please provide details on the themes, mediums, and artists featured in your future programs? I am particularly interested in how your upcoming selections will challenge and inspire viewers through their unique perspectives.

Thank you for your time and for continuing to support the creative community. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
